title: Run the daily venture studio cycle
goal: Generate three opportunities, score them, and select one candidate for a focused MVP cycle.

steps.text: Review ethics and operating constraints before generating ideas.
Generate exactly three opportunity candidates in plain language with target user, pain, and value proposition.
Score each candidate with the shared weighted scorecard and record assumptions, risks, and confidence.
Rank candidates and recommend one with explicit tradeoffs.
Draft a 14-day MVP outline for the selected candidate with scope, success metric, and first customer outreach step.

acceptanceCriteria: Each candidate has transparent weighted scoring
A single recommended candidate is selected with tradeoff rationale
Recommendation includes ethics and risk notes
Selected candidate includes a concrete 14-day MVP outline

verification.text: Confirm scoring is complete and legible for all candidates
Confirm the selected candidate was explicitly reviewed before MVP planning
